title: Agent UA Database
description: Schema for the @agentfriendly agent user-agent database

version.description: Semantic version of this database file

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 date of the last update

pattern.description: The user-agent string pattern to match against

matchType.description: How to match: exact string equality, startsWith prefix, or full regex

operator.description: The company or organization operating this agent

category.description: training-crawler: ingests for model training; search-bot: real-time search citations; interactive-agent: acts on behalf of users; browser-agent: headless browser automation

description.description: Human-readable description of what this agent does and any important notes

verificationSupport.description: Whether this agent supports RFC 9421 HTTP Message Signature verification

firstSeen.description: Approximate date when this agent was first observed

sources.description: URLs to documentation or references for this agent entry
